title: Shezmu - Rekt
relevance_summary: Arbitrary collateral minting followed by flash loan and withdrawal on DeFi protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints collateral and then immediately borrows a large amount using a flash loan.

red_flags: Unusual minting followed by flash loan
Low liquidity leading to significant value loss
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that mints collateral and then immediately borrows a large amount using a flash loan.
summary: The attacker exploited a vulnerability allowing arbitrary collateral minting, followed by a flash loan to withdraw $4.9 million. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for minting followed by a flash loan in the same transaction.
